basic_details.job_title: NIACL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 550 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: The New India Assurance Company Limited (NIACL)
basic_details.short_information: The New India Assurance Company Limited (NIACL) has released a short notification for the engagement of 550 Apprentices for training under the Apprentices Act, 1961. This apprenticeship program offers graduates an opportunity to gain practical training experience in one of India’s leading Public Sector General Insurance Companies.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 23-06-2026 Online Application Start Date: 23-06-2026 Last Date to Apply Online: 06-07-2026 Training Period: 1 Year

selection_process: Online Written Test Regional Language Test Document Verification Final Selection
how_to_apply: Visit the official website of NIACL or apprenticeship portal
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
Fill out the application form carefully
Take a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are released under NIACL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 550 Apprentice vacancies have been announced.

faq.question: Q2. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The New India Assurance Company Limited (NIACL) is conducting the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a graduate degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit?
faq.answer: The age limit is 21 to 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend offered?
faq.answer: The selected apprentices will receive Rs. 12,300 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the post name?
Q7. What is the application mode?
faq.answer: The application process is completely online.
